verse.name: V1
verse.lines: For many years now, You've been part of our lives, We've walked together through the good times and the trials; If there is one thing that I admire as I watch your life, It's your greatest heart's desire to live the life of Christ.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I know your heart's cry, I know your earnest desire, To follow the perfect will and leading of our Lord; Because your heart's cry, has helped lead so many home, I want my heart's cry to be just like yours.

verse.name: V3
